name: Electrochemistry Research
description: Studies in electrochemistry including batteries, fuel cells, sensors, and electrochemical processes

papers.title: High-Energy Density Solid-State Batteries with Garnet Electrolytes
papers.abstract: We develop garnet-based solid electrolytes with ionic conductivity >1 mS/cm at room temperature. Battery cells incorporating these electrolytes demonstrate 400 Wh/kg energy density with exceptional cycle life.

papers.title: Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy for Real-Time Battery Diagnostics
papers.abstract: A novel EIS methodology enables non-invasive detection of internal resistance changes in operating batteries. The technique can predict battery degradation months in advance with 92% accuracy.

papers.title: Enzymatic Fuel Cells with Enhanced Electron Transfer
papers.abstract: We present a novel mediator-free approach for electron transfer in enzymatic fuel cells. Achieved power densities of 8.2 mW/cm² represent a significant improvement over conventional designs.
